title: 'ayeleth #0365
definition:
1) doe, deer, hind
 2) "Aijeleth Shahar" is part of the title of \\#Ps 22:1\\ and probably
    describes to the musician the melody to which the psalm was
    to be played
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  lofty tree, a city and harbor on the Red Sea
